'''chomachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twelveth|twelveth]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twelveth|twelveth]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chomachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chomachithi|chomachithi]] || [[word:chomachiji|chomachiji]] || [[word:chomachishi|chomachishi]] || [[word:chomachiki|chomachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chomachuthuthu|chomachuthuthu]] || [[word:chomachujuju|chomachujuju]] || [[word:chomachushushu|chomachushushu]] || [[word:chomachukuku|chomachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chomachuthu|chomachuthu]] || [[word:chomachuju|chomachuju]] || [[word:chomachushu|chomachushu]] || [[word:chomachuku|chomachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chomachufthuf|chomachufthuf]] || [[word:chomachufjuf|chomachufjuf]] || [[word:chomachufshuf|chomachufshuf]] || [[word:chomachufkuf|chomachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chomachethe|chomachethe]] || [[word:chomacheje|chomacheje]] || [[word:chomacheshe|chomacheshe]] || [[word:chomacheke|chomacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chomachothotho|chomachothotho]] || [[word:chomachojojo|chomachojojo]] || [[word:chomachoshosho|chomachoshosho]] || [[word:chomachokoko|chomachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chomachotho|chomachotho]] || [[word:chomachojo|chomachojo]] || [[word:chomachosho|chomachosho]] || [[word:chomachoko|chomachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chomachofthof|chomachofthof]] || [[word:chomachofjof|chomachofjof]] || [[word:chomachofshof|chomachofshof]] || [[word:chomachofkof|chomachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfthĂŻf|chomachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfjĂŻf|chomachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfshĂŻf|chomachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfkĂŻf|chomachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chomachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chomachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chomachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chomachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfthĂŻf|chomachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfjĂŻf|chomachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfshĂŻf|chomachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfkĂŻf|chomachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfthĂŻf|chomachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfjĂŻf|chomachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfshĂŻf|chomachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chomachĂŻfkĂŻf|chomachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chomachĂŠthĂŠ|chomachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chomachĂŠjĂŠ|chomachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chomachĂŠshĂŠ|chomachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chomachĂŠkĂŠ|chomachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chomachathatha|chomachathatha]] || [[word:chomachajaja|chomachajaja]] || [[word:chomachashasha|chomachashasha]] || [[word:chomachakaka|chomachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chomachatha|chomachatha]] || [[word:chomachaja|chomachaja]] || [[word:chomachasha|chomachasha]] || [[word:chomachaka|chomachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chomachafthaf|chomachafthaf]] || [[word:chomachafjaf|chomachafjaf]] || [[word:chomachafshaf|chomachafshaf]] || [[word:chomachafkaf|chomachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chomachasha|chomachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chomachshĂ«sha|chomachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chomachrosha|chomachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chomachmusha|chomachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chomachyasha|chomachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochomachnkshĂ«sha|gochomachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochomachnkrosha|gochomachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochomachnkmusha|gochomachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochomachnkyasha|gochomachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chomamachasha|chomamachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chomamachshĂ«sha|chomamachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chomamachrosha|chomamachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chomamachmusha|chomamachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chomamachyasha|chomamachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochomamachnkshĂ«sha|gochomamachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochomamachnkrosha|gochomamachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochomamachnkmusha|gochomamachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochomamachnkyasha|gochomamachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chemĂŠchasha|chemĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chemĂŠchshĂ«sha|chemĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chemĂŠchrosha|chemĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chemĂŠchmusha|chemĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chemĂŠchyasha|chemĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochemĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gochemĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochemĂŠchnkrosha|gochemĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochemĂŠchnkmusha|gochemĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochemĂŠchnkyasha|gochemĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chomfachasha|chomfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chomfachshĂ«sha|chomfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chomfachrosha|chomfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chomfachmusha|chomfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chomfachyasha|chomfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochomfachnkshĂ«sha|gochomfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochomfachnkrosha|gochomfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochomfachnkmusha|gochomfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochomfachnkyasha|gochomfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
